memoryArtifacts.headline: Lutterell - The ancient chronicles of England
memoryArtifacts.description:
Lutterell
The ancient chronicles of England reveal the early records of the name Lutterell as a Norman surname which ranks as one of the oldest.  The history of the name is closely interwoven within t …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Luttrell於1287年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特時，他的父親Andrew de Lutterell23歲，母親Elizabeth Raleigh19歲。他於大約1320年與Rose在英國結婚。他去世於1363年1月24日在英國英格蘭戴文享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Luttrell于1287年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特时，他的父亲Andrew de Lutterell23岁，母亲Elizabeth Raleigh19岁。他于大约1320年与Rose在英国结婚。他去世于1363年1月24日在英国英格兰戴文享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Luttrell was born in 1287, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Andrew de Lutterell, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Raleigh, was 19. He married Rose about 1320, in England. He died on 24 January 1363, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Luttrell est né en 1287, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Andrew de Lutterell, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Raleigh, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Rose environ 1320, à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 24 janvier 1363, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Luttrell 1287 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew de Lutterell 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Raleigh 19. Er hat um 1320 in England Rose geheiratet. Er starb am 24. Januar 1363 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Luttrell è nato il nel 1287 nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Andrew de Lutterell, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Raleigh, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Rose circa 1320, nel England. Morì il 24 gennaio 1363, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Luttrellが1287年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターで生まれた時，父Andrew de Lutterellは23歳，母Elizabeth Raleighは19歳であった。約1320年にイギリスでRoseと結婚した。彼は1363年1月24日にイギリスイギリスデボンで76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Luttrell(이)가 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew de Lutterell(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Raleigh(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 영국에서 Rose(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1363년 1월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Luttrell nasceu em 1287, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Andrew de Lutterell, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Raleigh, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Rose aproximadamente 1320, em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 24 de janeiro de 1363, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Luttrell родился в 1287 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Andrew de Lutterell было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Raleigh, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Rose около 1320 г. в местности Англия. Он умер 24 января 1363 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Luttrell nació en 1287, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Andrew de Lutterell, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Raleigh, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Rose aproximadamente 1320, en Inglaterra. Murió el 24 de enero de 1363, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años.
